     the Fermi energy is    -0.2665 ev

!    total energy              =   -7323.99784840 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.3E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.18634483 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -7323.81150356 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -149036.63586673 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   75225.31840360 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2813.82431212 Ry
